calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: Scaffolded forced action-bias actuator retest
items.note: Lettered successor to V3-EXQ-563. Enables use_action_class_scaffold_candidates and corrected 5-class forced bias to test E3 score-bias actuator on a real multi-action candidate surface.
